debug_info.goal:
u v : ℕ
S : Set ℕ
h₀ : ∀ (n : ℕ), n ∈ S ↔ 0 < n ∧ 14 * n % 100 = 46
h₁ : IsLeast S u
h₂ : IsLeast (S \ {u}) v
⊢ (↑u + ↑v) / 2 = 64

proof:
have hu1 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
  have hu2 : ∀ n ∈ S, u ≤ n := h₁.right
  have h3 : u > 0 := by
    have h4 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    rw [h₀] at h4
    omega
  have h4 : 14 * u % 100 = 46 := by
    have h4 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    rw [h₀] at h4
    omega
  have hv1 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left
  have hv2 : ∀ n ∈ S \ {u}, v ≤ n := h₂.right
  have h5 : v ∈ S := by
    simpa using hv1.left
  have h6 : v ≠ u := by
    simpa using hv1.right
  have h7 : 14 * v % 100 = 46 := by
    have h8 : v ∈ S := h5
    rw [h₀] at h8
    omega
  have h8 : u = 39 := by
    have h9 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    have h10 : ∀ n ∈ S, u ≤ n := h₁.right
    have h11 : 39 ∈ S := by
      rw [h₀]
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · norm_num
    have h12 : u ≤ 39 := by
      apply h10 39
      exact h11
    have h13 : u ≥ 39 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h14 : u < 39 := by omega
      interval_cases u <;> norm_num [h₀] at h9
    omega
  have h9 : v = 89 := by
    have h10 : v ∈ S := by
      simpa using hv1.left
    have h11 : v ≠ u := by
      simpa using hv1.right
    have h12 : ∀ n ∈ S \ {u}, v ≤ n := h₂.right
    have h13 : 89 ∈ S \ {u} := by
      have h14 : 89 ∈ S := by
        rw [h₀]
        constructor
        · norm_num
        · norm_num
      have h15 : 89 ≠ u := by
        omega
      simp [h14, h15]
    have h16 : v ≤ 89 := by
      apply h12 89
      exact h13
    have h17 : v ≥ 89 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h18 : v < 89 := by omega
      have h19 : v ∈ S := h10
      have h20 : v ≠ u := h11
      interval_cases v <;> norm_num [h₀] at h19
      <;> omega
    omega
  rw [show (u : ℚ) = (39 : ℚ) by exact_mod_cast h8, show (v : ℚ) = (89 : ℚ) by exact_mod_cast h9]
  norm_num
failed_attempts:
have hu1 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
  have hu2 : ∀ n ∈ S, u ≤ n := h₁.right
  have h3 : 0 < u := by
    have h4 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    rw [h₀] at h4
    omega
  have h4 : 14 * u % 100 = 46 := by
    have h5 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    rw [h₀] at h5
    omega
  have h5 : u ≥ 39 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h6 : u < 39 := h
    interval_cases u <;> norm_num at h4 h3 <;> try { contradiction }
  have h6 : u ≤ 39 := by
    have h7 : 39 ∈ S := by
      rw [h₀]
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · norm_num
    have h8 : u ≤ 39 := by
      apply hu2 39 h7
    omega
  have hu : u = 39 := by
    omega
  -- Now proving v = 89
  have hv1 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left
  have hv2 : ∀ n ∈ S \ {u}, v ≤ n := h₂.right
  have hv3 : v ∈ S := by
    have h8 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left
    simp at h8 ⊢
    omega
  have hv4 : v ≠ u := by
    have h8 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left
    simp at h8 ⊢
    omega
  have h7 : 0 < v := by
    have h8 : v ∈ S := hv3
    rw [h₀] at h8
    omega
  have h8 : 14 * v % 100 = 46 := by
    have h9 : v ∈ S := hv3
    rw [h₀] at h9
    omega
  have h9 : v ≥ 89 := by
    by_contra h
    push_neg at h
    have h10 : v < 89 := h
    interval_cases v <;> norm_num at h8 h7 hv4 <;> try { contradiction }
    <;> try { omega }
  have h10 : v ≤ 89 := by
    have h11 : 89 ∈ S \ {u} := by
      have h12 : (89 : ℕ) ∈ S := by
        rw [h₀]
        constructor
        · norm_num
        · norm_num
      have h13 : (89 : ℕ) ≠ u := by
        omega
      simp [h12, h13]
    have h14 : v ≤ 89 := by
      apply hv2 89 h11
    omega
  have hv : v = 89 := by
    omega
  rw [hu, hv]
  norm_num

have hu1 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
  have hu2 : ∀ n, n ∈ S → u ≤ n := h₁.right
  have h3 : u > 0 := by 
    have h4 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    rw [h₀] at h4 
    omega 
  have h4 : u ≤ 39 := by 
    have h5 : (39 : ℕ) ∈ S := by 
      rw [h₀]
      constructor 
      · norm_num 
      · norm_num 
    have h6 : u ≤ (39 : ℕ) := by 
      apply hu2 39 
      exact h5 
    linarith 
  have h5 : 39 ≤ u := by 
    by_contra h 
    push_neg at h 
    have h6 : u < 39 := by 
      omega 
    have h7 : u ∈ S := h₁.left 
    rw [h₀] at h7 
    rcases h7 with ⟨h8, h9⟩ 
    interval_cases u <;> norm_num at h9 
    all_goals omega 
  have u_eq : u = 39 := by 
    linarith 
  have hv1 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left 
  have hv2 : ∀ n, n ∈ S \ {u} → v ≤ n := h₂.right 
  have h8 : v ∈ S := by 
    have h9 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left 
    simp at h9 ⊢ 
    tauto 
  have h9 : v ≠ u := by 
    have h10 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left 
    simp at h10 ⊢ 
    tauto 
  have h10 : v > 0 := by 
    have h11 : v ∈ S := h8 
    rw [h₀] at h11 
    omega 
  have h11 : v ≥ 89 := by 
    by_contra h 
    push_neg at h 
    have h12 : v < 89 := by 
      omega 
    have h13 : v ∈ S := h8 
    rw [h₀] at h13 
    rcases h13 with ⟨h14, h15⟩ 
    have h16 : v ≠ 39 := by 
      omega 
    interval_cases v <;> norm_num at h15 h14 
    <;> omega 
  have h12 : v ≤ 89 := by 
    have h13 : (89 : ℕ) ∈ S \ {u} := by 
      constructor 
      · -- Show 89 ∈ S
        rw [h₀]
        constructor 
        · norm_num 
        · norm_num 
      · -- Show 89 ≠ u 
        rw [u_eq] 
        all_goals norm_num 
    have h14 : v ≤ (89 : ℕ) := by 
      apply hv2 89 
      exact h13 
    linarith 
  have v_eq : v = 89 := by 
    linarith 
  rw [u_eq, v_eq] 
  norm_num
successful_attempts:

  have hu2 : ∀ n ∈ S, u ≤ n := h₁.right
  have h3 : u > 0 := by
    have h4 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    rw [h₀] at h4
    omega
  have h4 : 14 * u % 100 = 46 := by
    have h4 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    rw [h₀] at h4
    omega
  have hv1 : v ∈ S \ {u} := h₂.left
  have hv2 : ∀ n ∈ S \ {u}, v ≤ n := h₂.right
  have h5 : v ∈ S := by
    simpa using hv1.left
  have h6 : v ≠ u := by
    simpa using hv1.right
  have h7 : 14 * v % 100 = 46 := by
    have h8 : v ∈ S := h5
    rw [h₀] at h8
    omega
  have h8 : u = 39 := by
    have h9 : u ∈ S := h₁.left
    have h10 : ∀ n ∈ S, u ≤ n := h₁.right
    have h11 : 39 ∈ S := by
      rw [h₀]
      constructor
      · norm_num
      · norm_num
    have h12 : u ≤ 39 := by
      apply h10 39
      exact h11
    have h13 : u ≥ 39 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h14 : u < 39 := by omega
      interval_cases u <;> norm_num [h₀] at h9
    omega
  have h9 : v = 89 := by
    have h10 : v ∈ S := by
      simpa using hv1.left
    have h11 : v ≠ u := by
      simpa using hv1.right
    have h12 : ∀ n ∈ S \ {u}, v ≤ n := h₂.right
    have h13 : 89 ∈ S \ {u} := by
      have h14 : 89 ∈ S := by
        rw [h₀]
        constructor
        · norm_num
        · norm_num
      have h15 : 89 ≠ u := by

      simp [h14, h15]
    have h16 : v ≤ 89 := by

      exact h13
    have h17 : v ≥ 89 := by
      by_contra h
      push_neg at h
      have h18 : v < 89 := by omega
      have h19 : v ∈ S := h10
      have h20 : v ≠ u := h11

      <;> omega
    omega
  rw [show (u : ℚ) = (39 : ℚ) by exact_mod_cast h8, show (v : ℚ) = (89 : ℚ) by exact_mod_cast h9]
  norm_num
